case_title: FAYE, DANIEL VS THE GARAGE AUTO SERVICE INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY FAYE, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT THE GARAGE AUTO SERVICE INC. CHAN, DANNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE GARAGE AUTO SERVICE INC.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,335.00 FILED BY THE GARAGE AUTO SERVICE INC. CHAN, DANNY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT FAYE, DANIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAYE, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE GARAGE AUTO SERVICE INC. CHAN, DANNY $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,850.00, PLALINTIFF TO RETURN ENGINE TO DEFT. BY 10/11/02 AT 5:00 PM. DANNY WILLIAMS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT THE GARAGE AUTO SERVICE INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT FAYE, DANIEL PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAILING TO DANIEL FAYE RETURNED TO COURT: UNCLAIMED.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT: NO SUCH NUMBER.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT THE GARAGE AUTO SERVICE INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,933.02 AS TO DEFENDANT THE GARAGE AUTO SERVICE INC.
